basic_details.job_title: ECHS Pune Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Medical Officer and Chowkidar Posts

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with minimum three years experience after internship, Class 8th or GD trade for Armed Forces personnel
qualification.details: Medical Officer: Basic Qualification - MBBS. Work Experience - Minimum three (03) years after internship. Preferable additional qualification in Medicine/Surgery. Reservation- 60% reserved for Ex-Servicemen. Chowkidar: Qualification – Class 8th or GD trade for Armed Forces personnel. Reservation-70% reserved for Ex-Servicemen.

selection_process: Scrutiny of Applications Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Pune Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download ECHS Pune Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ECHS Pune Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the ECHS Pune Recruitment 2026 is 20th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Medical Officer and Chowkidar posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced under this recruitment drive. Out of these, 2 vacancies are for the Medical Officer post and 1 vacancy is for the Chowkidar post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: For the Medical Officer position, candidates must possess an MBBS degree with a minimum of three years of experience after completing their internship. Additional qualifications in Medicine or Surgery are preferred.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility criteria for the Chowkidar post?
faq.answer: The eligibility criteria for the Chowkidar post include having completed Class 8th education or possessing a GD trade qualification for Armed Forces personnel. A significant reservation is available for Ex-Servicemen.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Medical Officer and Chowkidar positions?
faq.answer: The salary for the Medical Officer post is Rs. 95,000/- per month, and for the Chowkidar post, it is Rs. 21,800/- per month. The overall salary range for these positions is between Rs. 21,800 to Rs. 95,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for ECHS Pune Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the ECHS Pune Recruitment 2026. Candidates can apply without paying any application charges.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the ECHS Pune Recruitment 2026 involves a scrutiny of applications, followed by an interview, and finally, document verification for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. When is the interview date for the ECHS Pune Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The interview for the ECHS Pune Recruitment 2026 is scheduled to be held on 25th June 2026. Candidates who are shortlisted after the application scrutiny will be called for the interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for the ECHS Pune Recruitment 2026 is offline. Interested candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and submit it via post or as instructed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS), which is www.echs.gov.in. It is recommended to visit the website for the most accurate and up-to-date information.
